steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says Carmen Lomas Garza is "______ direct experience, drawing from memories of her childhood in Texas or details of her current surroundings in California." The participial phrase after the dash explains what "drawing from" means: she actively uses her lived experience as source material. The blank must describe her relationship to that experience in a way that fits this active use.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'complimented by': means her work receives praise from direct experience, which makes no sense — experience doesn't praise a person. ✗
  • Choice B — 'uncertain about': means she doubts her own experience. The passage says the opposite: she draws on it confidently as creative fuel. ✗
  • Choice C — 'unbothered by': means direct experience has no effect on her. The passage shows it is the explicit source of her imagery. ✗
  • Choice D — 'inspired by': means direct experience drives her creative work — exactly what "drawing from memories… or details of her current surroundings" describes. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
